Scalable all-reduce optimization plan:

1. Use NUMA-aware data partitioning to minimize cache misses.
2. Overlap communication with computation using SIMD instructions.
3. Use a lock-free data structure for efficient synchronization.
4. Use a lock-free queue for efficient communication.
